Passkeys, Social Sign In, OIDC, Magic Link, Multi-Factor Auth, SMS, SAML, TOTP, and more. Runs everywhere, runs best on Ory Network.

projects.name: keto
projects.description: The most scalable and customizable permission server on the market. Fix your slow or broken permission system with Google's proven "Zanzibar" approach. Supports ACL, RBAC, and more. Written in Go, cloud native, headless, API-first. Available as a service on Ory Network and for self-hosters.

projects.name: ert
projects.description: ERT - Ensemble based Reservoir Tool - is designed for running ensembles of dynamical models such as reservoir models, in order to do sensitivity analysis and data assimilation. ERT supports data assimilation using the Ensemble Smoother (ES) and Ensemble Smoother with Multiple Data Assimilation (ES-MDA).

projects.name: model-registry
projects.description: Model Registry provides a single pane of glass for ML model developers to index and manage models, versions, and ML artifacts metadata.
